testcase.name: test_register_flips_invited_to_active_in_acuity_team

failure.message:
AssertionError: Status was not flipped: {'user_id': 'd16eae25-89cd-45d3-9822-b02cbf6fa04d', 'name': 'TEST_signup_f96c1dd7d7', 'email': 'TEST_signup_f96c1dd7d7@example.com', 'role': 'member', 'status': 'invited', 'joined_at': '2026-04-30T11:18:04.664000', 'avatar': None} assert 'invited' == 'active'
- active + invited

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: Status was not flipped: {'user_id': 'd16eae25-89cd-45d3-9822-b02cbf6fa04d', 'name': 'TEST_signup_f96c1dd7d7', 'email': 'TEST_signup_f96c1dd7d7@example.com', 'role': 'member', 'status': 'invited', 'joined_at': '2026-04-30T11:18:04.664000', 'avatar': None} assert 'invited' == 'active'
- active + invited
